event: Synthetix disclosed that a commercial KRW feed intermittently reported a price about 1000 times higher than the correct rate
An automated trading bot traded into and out of sKRW while the bad feed was live
reported_metric: 1000x trade profits and more than $1B apparent profit in less than one hour

event: Synthetix stopped the oracle service from sending rates to contracts and halted transfers and trading
The Block reported that the incident exposed more than 37 million sETH
Synthetix said the bot owner agreed to reverse the trades in exchange for a bug bounty
